message:
Add Streamdown markdown-lite renderer for inline rich text

Introduces a new Streamdown component that parses a lightweight
subset of Markdown (headings, bold, italic, inline code, links,
lists, and fenced code blocks) and renders it with FrankenTUI
theming. Code blocks are routed through RustCodeBlock for
syntax-highlighted display. The parser uses regex-based splitting
to separate fenced code blocks from prose, then applies inline
Markdown transforms to the text segments. This component will be
used across glossary entries, war story cards, and bead detail
modals to render description fields that may contain Markdown
formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
